title: taraxacum perenne
intro: Taraxacum perenne, also known as perennial dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and support liver health. The health benefits of Taraxacum perenne include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and aiding in the removal of toxins from the body. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum perenne include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
